leadText: Litleo (Japanese: シシコ Shishiko) is a dual-type Fire/Normal Pokémon introduced in Generation VI. It evolves into Pyroar starting at level 35.

sections.title: Biology
sections.text: Biology [ edit | edit source ] Litleo is a quadrupedal, leonine Pokémon . It is mostly dark brown with pale brown paws, ears, tail tip, and face. It has a short, rounded muzzle with a reddish-orange nose, round ears with darker interiors, and circular, black eyes with white pupils. There is a reddish-orange tuft of mane between its ears. Each of its paws has three toes and dark brown paw pads. The tail ends in a pointed, teardrop shape. Litleo is a hot-blooded Pokémon that is curious by nature and is quick to start fights. In battle, its short mane radiates heat. The stronger its opponent, the more heat it produces. Litleo live in prides, where they are raised and taught to hunt by female Pyroar . When a wild Litleo is capable of hunting on its own, it is kicked out of the pride and begins to live alone. It lives in grassy plains and along cliff sides. Prior to Generation VII , Litleo and its evolved form, Pyroar, were the only known Pokémon capable of learning the move Noble Roar . Evolution [ edit | edit source ] Litleo evolves into Pyroar . (For specifics on this Pokémon's Evolution in the games, refer to Game data→Evolution data .) Unevolved Litleo Fire Normal Male → First Evolution Pyroar Male Fire Normal Female → First Evolution Pyroar Female Fire Normal

Generation VI Central Kalos #057 Coastal Kalos #— Mountain Kalos #— Hoenn #— X The stronger the opponent it faces, the more heat surges from its mane and the more power flows through its body. Y They set off on their own from their pride and live by themselves to become stronger. These hot-blooded Pokémon are quick to fight. Omega Ruby The stronger the opponent it faces, the more heat surges from its mane and the more power flows through its body. Alpha Sapphire They set off on their own from their pride and live by themselves to become stronger. These hot-blooded Pokémon are quick to fight. Generation VII Alola US UM : #370 Kanto #— This Pokémon has no Pokédex entries in Sun, Moon , Let's Go, Pikachu! and Let's Go, Eevee! . Ultra Sun When they're young, they live with a pride. Once they're able to hunt prey on their own, they're kicked out and have to make their own way. Ultra Moon This hot-blooded Pokémon is filled with curiosity. When it gets angry or starts fighting, its short mane gets hot. Generation VIII Galar #— Isle of Armor #— Crown Tundra #— Sinnoh #— Hisui #— This Pokémon has no Pokédex entries in Generation VIII . Generation IX Paldea #224 Kitakami #— Blueberry #36 Lumiose #045 Hyperspace #— Scarlet When Litleo are young, female Pyroar will teach them how to hunt. Once the Litleo mature, they will leave the pride and set out on their own. Violet The more a Litleo trains its body and spirit by battling mighty enemies, the hotter its mane will grow. Legends: Z-A They set off on their own from their pride and live by themselves to become stronger. These hot-blooded Pokémon are quick to fight. Spin-off games Pokopia #— This Pokémon has no Pokédex entries in Pokopia . sections.title: Pokédex entries
sections.text: Pokédex entries [ edit | edit source ] Episode Pokémon Source Entry XY097 Litleo Ash's Pokédex Litleo, the Lion Cub Pokémon. Litleo must leave its pride and fend for itself in order to grow up strong.
